---
title: "Meta Summary - Gone Golfing"
subtitle: "Audit Report - Train Spotting"
author: "Michael Manolakis"
date: today
date-format: "[Spring] YYYY"
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    number-sections: true
    colorlinks: true
    geometry: margin=1in
---

\newpage

{{< include "./Phase1_Rerun_Report.md" >}}

\newpage

{{< include "./Phase2_Rerun_Report.md" >}}

\newpage

{{< include "./Phase3_Rerun_Report.md" >}}

\newpage

{{< include "./Phase4_Rerun_Report.md" >}}

\newpage

{{< include "./Phase5_Rerun_Report.md" >}}

\newpage

{{< include "./Phase6_Rerun_Report.md" >}}

\newpage

{{< include "./Phase7_Rerun_Report.md" >}}
